mod_list.mod:
https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1831/agony-sfx
This mod adds a chance for characters to play OnAgony sound effects when they die.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2521/amands-sense-updated
Sense shows icons over interactable items within a range, such as Loot, Containers, and Dead Bodies. There are unique highlights for Kappa, Quest and Wishlist Items. It will also show an icon and distance to map extracts, along with extract status.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2519/armbands-for-all
Allows all bots to have an armband slot.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1469/autodeposit
Click the button added to your equipment UI, and items will be transferred to containers in your stash that already contain that same item.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2443/backdoor-bandit-ng
Thought breaching a locked door was impossible? Now you can shoot it open and you don't need the key.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2480/barteritemsstacks
Stack size and resource values are supported for barter items, medical items, special items, repair kits, food and drinks. All other parameters should work for all items without any problems.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2221/ball-better-ammo-loading-list
This mod enhances the ammo list in the context menu when loading a magazine:
- Displays additional stats for each ammo type: - Penetration Power, - Velocity, or - Damage - Colors each stat using a gradient from green (better) to red (worse). - Automatically sorts the list by the selected stat

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/902/bigbrain
This is a library meant for use by developers, and may be required as a dependency for some plugins. Installing it by itself will have no effect on your game, without another plugin that utilizes it.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2586/caliber-under-ammo-name
Adds a caliber label below the short name for ammo ammo boxes. It also adds caliber labels to weapons, magazines, and in-raid items.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1090/color-converter-api
An SPT module mod that extends the functionality of the client, allowing the server to use raw hexcode color values for fields that ordinarily can only support BSG-created color enums.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1884/continuous-healing
With Continuous Healing you can click the healing button once and it will continue healing all limbs until you reach 100%, removing the need to do it for every limb and waiting for the animations to bring up your weapon. The delay that is normally 2 seconds is removed between each limb, speeding up healing slightly as well. If the med kit runs out it will stop as per usual.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2112/continuous-load-ammo
Continuous Load Ammo introduces the ability to load or unload your magazine outside your inventory. Gone are the days of staring at the inventory screen while topping up!

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/938/custom-interactions
Add custom context menu items to existing context menus, including adding custom submenus.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/820/door-randomizer
Super simple client mod that will randomize the open state of every non-locked door on raid start.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2214/doordash
Run through closed unlocked doors with enough momentum.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2344/dynamic-item-weights
Dynamic Item Weights adjusts the weight of items based on their current usage.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1431/dynamic-maps
Tired of getting lost? Here!

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2091/entry-point-selector
A mod that easily allows you to choose where to spawn in as PMC or Scav, and supports customization via the F12 menu.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1136/equip-from-weapon-rack
Tired of having to load your hideout just to get access to one of your guns that you’ve put on display?
No more! Now you can use the quick equip selector to pick guns from your weapon rack alongside those in your stash!

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1249/exfil-flare-notification
Have you ever used the Green Signal flare to activate the Klimov Street extraction point on Streets or Mira Ave on Ground Zero, but wasn

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2422/foldables
Foldables introduces the ability to fold your backpacks and unarmoured vests, collapsing them into smaller grid sizes. This way you can save space in your stash, or keep valuable backpacks/vests you find in-raid.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2501/blackhorse311-forcibleentry
Force open any locked door by breaching it multiple times.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/701/fontaines-fov-fix
Removes the FOV change on aiming by default, and lets you customize the FOV change amount. Has options for modifying FOV scale, view model FOV, ADS camera movement smoothing, and optional toggle zoom (like ARMA or DAYZ).

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/865/gilded-key-storage
This mod aims to add a balanced way to store all your keys in one grid square, and do so in a convenient way that makes it easy to tell if you have already acquired a key.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2165/hall-of-fame-improvements-311x-port
Improves the Hall of Fame hideout area by making your displayed trophies add to the skill leveling bonus based on their value and variety!

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1274/healing-autocancel
Automatically cancels applied med kits when the body part is at full health and is not bleeding or broken.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2076/hideout-in-progress
This mod for SPT adds a "Transfer Items" button to hideout construction/upgrade windows.
Clicking this button will contribute any items in your stash towards the upgrade, and the UI will update to reflect the remaining resources required.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1676/interactable-exfils-api
Adds interaction prompts to exfils, letting you toggle the exfil timer on and off (you can finally loot that body without extracting!) as well as API tools for modders to add their own exfil interaction options.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/910/item-attribute-fix
A universal fix for item attribute tooltip not being updated when the attribute has changed while the inspection window is open.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/940/item-context-menu-extended
A mod that adds extra context menu items for specific item types and allows changing the scaling of context menus.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/909/item-sell-price
A mod that uses the game’s built-in methods to show the highest selling price offer from traders, exactly as displayed in the selling UI. Hovering over the attribute will reveal available offers from all traders who can buy this item, sorted from highest to lowest.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2599/loadbundleevenfaster
Sick of staring at the

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2563/loadbundlefaster-crc32-patch
LoadBundleFaster is a performance plugin that replaces SPT

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/812/looting-bots
This mod aims to add more life to the bots by enhancing some EFT looting behaviors letting bots loot items, containers, and corpses during patrols.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/914/magazine-inspector
View the loaded ammo stack in a magazine, from top to bottom, taking the magazine's "checked" state and character's "Mag Drills" skill into account.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1300/modding-stats-helper-by-wara
Adds a tooltip when hovering parts in the weapon building screen that shows a quick overview of relevant stats and comparisons.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1533/more-tag-colours
Tired of not having enough tag colours to identify your 15 ammo cases? No more! This mod adds additional colours for you to use! 27 of them!

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2426/morebotsapi
API for making the implementation of custom bots easier.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/972/munitions-expert-reboot
View hidden attributes of ammo, with custom background colors based on penetration power values.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1965/plant-time-modifier-updated-by-crocodilejonesy
This lets you adjust "Protect objective", "Hiding objective" and "Repairing objective" task action times.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1374/player-encumbrance-bar
Adds a progress bar to the inventory that shows total player encumbrance.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1305/repair-max-durability
Literally just adds an item that repairs the max durability of weapons.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2427/ruaf-come-home
RUAF Come Home! adds RUAF as a proper faction to SPT. Encounter patrolling squads of soldiers. They have orders to shoot USEC on sight, so be careful! If you

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/791/sain-solarints-ai-modifications-full-ai-combat-system-replacement
Bots that don't suck.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/934/search-open-containers
Allow searching open containers without needing to close them first.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2299/show-me-the-money-item-pricing
Snag the ultimate deal! The tooltip now shows the boldest trader offer and a flea-market price engineered for a perfectly inevitable sale.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2383/skills-extended
Skills Extended is back from its eternal nap! This mod adds 10 new skills to the game. Including a lock picking Mini-game!

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1343/skipper
Simply adds a

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1861/stash-management-helper
Enhances stash management with extra sorting features. This can sort your stash long after the default sorting fails.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1853/stattrack
Ever wanted to know how many kills and headshots you have with a specific weapon? Now you can. All weapons will individually track their kills and headshots and display on the info screen for the weapon. See how many you can rack up before you die!

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/824/task-list-fixes
Do you want to fix sorting, improve sorting, and improve performance? Grab Task List Fixes and you'll get it all in one simple DLL.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1342/ui-fixes
Quality of life improvements and fixes for SPT.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2342/untar-go-home
UNTAR Go Home! adds UNTAR as a proper faction to SPT. Encounter roving patrols of peacekeepers. Their ROE states that they are only to shoot if threatened, so try not to piss them off!

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2386/use-items-anywhere
Use and bind items from anywhere in your inventory.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2530/vertical-hideout
Replace the horizontal carousel with a sane vertical list.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2213/jankys-visual-assist
Accurate visual ballistic arc for grenades. Do you identify as a pitching machine? Yearn to sink a grenade down a scav's pants from a dozen yards? This is the tool to get you going.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/827/waypoints-expanded-navmesh
Expand the area that bots can roam using Waypoints!

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/1950/weapon-customizer
This mod allows you to adjust the positions of some of your weapon attachments. This is a purely aesthetic mod - it has no effect on weapon statistics.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2499/wikilinks
Adds links to the wiki for items and quests. - For items, it adds a context menu button (which also shows up in the inspect panel). - For quests, adds a button to the quest description which will show up both in the Trader Tasks view as well as the Player Tasks view.
The EFT Wiki is for the live game. SPT is not, and may never be, on the same version as live. There can and will be differences.

https://forge.sp-tarkov.com/mod/2310/wtt-commonlib
A modding utility library that eliminates boilerplate when adding custom items, quests, characters, and more to SPT.
This mod adds a total sixteen items (eight cases, and eightTEEN belts) to various traders at different loyalty levels.
